default.text: ⟦⟦ M̃ãĩñ ãt̃t̃ẽñt̃ĩõñ ĩs̃ r̃ẽq̃ũĩr̃ẽd̃ õñ s̃t̃ãb̃l̃ẽ ẽx̃ẽc̃ũt̃ĩõñ. ⟧⟧

timing_focus.text: ⟦⟦ T̃ĩm̃ĩñg̃ c̃õñt̃r̃õl̃ ĩs̃ ã k̃ẽỹ f̃õc̃ũs̃ t̃h̃r̃õũg̃h̃õũt̃. ⟧⟧

consistency_focus.text: ⟦⟦ C̃õñs̃ĩs̃t̃ẽñc̃ỹ ĩs̃ c̃ẽñt̃r̃ãl̃ t̃õ m̃ãĩñt̃ãĩñĩñg̃ p̃ẽr̃f̃õr̃m̃ãñc̃ẽ. ⟧⟧
